## Summary

- explain the change clearly
- explain why it belongs in `autent`

## Validation

- [ ] `just check`
- [ ] `just ci` when practical
- [ ] docs updated if behavior or examples changed
- [ ] governance, CI, or release impact explained if sensitive maintainer surfaces changed

## Notes

- list any follow-up work or open questions
- call out any CI, release, governance, or contributor-workflow impact
